Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4462 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Driller.prg,0x0400,0x00EC" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $8e00 lda #$37 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Driller.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Inserted byte packed colour RAM data (512 bytes) to dump file at $8E00 to restore before starting the game. Also changed the SEI instruction at $D154 to be RTS instead, which disables the manual protection check when starting the game, or loading a saved game.
As the game itself plays the SID tune too fast (it's synced against CIA#1 timer A at 60Hz, instead of the raster interrupt at 50Hz on a PAL C64), the SID music is now used in the simulated tape loader for the cartridge so that it can be played at the speed originally intended by Matt Gray.
